channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped household waste on street, 9th May
item.description:
This revolting mess is caused by some unthinking person dumping their waste and recycling in a public bin. Shocking!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 9th May
item.description:
Popular flytipping spot! Please patrol this area on regular basis

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reddins Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac spilt over the pavement., 9th May
item.description:
When the pothole in the road was repaired, the truck that did the repair spilt tarmac over the road and pavement. Lose tarmac bits and large stain of liquid tarmac.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coniston Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese Knotweed, 9th May
item.description:
There is Japanese Knitcoming through the road surface it is also spreading into Gipsy Hill railway station community garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sainsbury Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 9th May
item.description:
Constantly dirty here Please think of more permanent solution for this area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped on elcot avenue, 9th May
item.description:
Please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken Drain, 9th May
item.description:
Sunken Drain. Particularly dangerous for cyclists

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merlin Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 87 Glengall Road NW6, 9th May
item.description:
Dumped mattress in Glengall Rd. Also can you please check and clear the pedestrianised part of Hazelmere Rd opposite - it is covered in litter and small flytipped items as usual.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Flytipping, 9th May
item.description:
There is constant fly tippers next to St David’s Mansion on Dunstans Road (SE22) Fly tippers leave lots of rubbish - especially furniture - and time and time again leave a blue wheelie bin with no lid, filling it with non recyclable rubbish which then flies all over the road. It’s an eye sore and unhygienic. This corner of Dunstans Road needs a camera and the fly tipper(s) need(sh to be fined.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Dunstan's Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of soiled papers spreading on street, 9th May
item.description:
A bag of soiled papers and tissues or medical waste has been abandoned on Point Hill.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westgrove Lane, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Blackheath Hill, 9th May
item.description:
There are black bags full of rubbish in the street on Blackheath Hill near the George and Dragon traffic lights.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robinscroft Mews, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge by the water tower, 9th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned blue BMW with front damaged, 9th May
item.description:
Abandoned blue BMW with front damaged Has not moved for about 7 weeks, has been damaged / crashed at the front, located at the end of Gladwell Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladwell Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire at stave hill, 9th May
item.description:
The remains of a fire are present at stave Hill Park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stave Hill, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newly planted tree at 100 Hoxton Street – ties STILL attached, 9th May
item.description:
Dear Street Trees Team, The transport ties/cords used to secure the branches during transport were not removed for one tree at 100 hoxton st. The branches are still tightly bound together and the branches are effectively still “packed”. Could you untie?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering outside recycling bins, 9th May
item.description:
Clothes etc dumped outside recycling bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox cub, 9th May
item.description:
I have double bagged the dead fox cub and left it on the edge of the drive at 110 Kingsway, Petts Wood, BR5 1PU
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole located on Welling Way between Southcroft Avenue and the post box, 9th May
item.description:
Although this pothole is close to the central reservation and on first look seemingly not in line with offside wheels, it is in actual fact in the main driving lane due to having to give the cars permanently parked in the marked bays on Welling Way sufficient clearance. (I am daily trying to avoid the pothole as this is the route to my house) but in doing so I find I am swerving left in towards the parked cars which is unnerving and dangerous, and could ultimately take off a mirror from a parked car and indeed my own which is not acceptable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Welling Way, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped radiator, 9th May
item.description:
There has been a persistent problem with smith and Byford flytipping radiators on the estate. This is the latest example. Please follow up and fine them for this. It’s unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mary Datchelor Close, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide container, 9th May
item.description:
Nitrous oxide container left on Woodmill Road pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodmill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
